title: Ticket 04 - Threats & social engineering
description: Dummy data for ticket 04 - threats & social engineering (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 04 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company threats and social engineering safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training-company threats and social engineering in daily work and implement it cleanly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of training-company threats and social engineering in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore training-company threats and social engineering as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Training-company threats and social engineering should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with training-company threats and social engineering.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: Training-company threats and social engineering only become relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 04 regarding training-company threats and social engineering?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For training-company threats and social engineering this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
